name: [Version 5.5] Dandys World -- 27/40
description:
Toons Will Be Added In The Order They Came In, And Yes, Toodles And Gourdy Will Be Aged Up.

If The AI Messes Something Up, Just Edit The Message To Correct It. If There's Something Missing, Tell Me In The Comments.

For When The Holiday Toons Are Added, They Will Have Special Intro Messages.

The Dates Will Not Be Correct, But IDC. It Starts On January 1st, 2000.

[Version 1.0]: Added Astro, Boxten, Brightney, Dandy, Goob, Pebble, Poppy, Razzle & Dazzle, Rodger, Scraps, Shrimpo, Toodles, Vee.

[Version 2.0]: Added Flutter, Shelly, Teagan, Tisha.

[Version 3.0]: Added Cosmo, Finn, Glisten, Sprout.

[Version 3.5]: Added Gigi.

[Version 4.0]: Also Decided To Add Looey & Connie.

[Version 5.0]: Added Bobette, Coal, Ginger, Rudie

[Version 5.5]: Added Yatta
creator: Eclipse The Werewolf
